manufacturing unit in Mundathikode, Thrissur, where pyrotechnics were being prepared for the Thiruvambady Devaswom in anticipation of the Thrissur Pooram festival. Preliminary reports suggest that approximately 40 people have sustained injuries in the blast. Emergency responders quickly arrived at the scene, and the injured have been rushed to the Thrissur Medical College Hospital and other nearby medical facilities for urgent treatment.
